description: Proves Phase 14.1R refuses 9 categories of unsafe actions

policy_checks.evidence: saas/ is deleted (commit e3bd216e). Recreation requires explicit operator approval. No automated process recreates it.

policy_checks.action: Copy Beast app source into /opt/OS without approval
policy_checks.evidence: No Beast app files (src/app/, Clerk providers, etc.) exist in /opt/OS outside cockpit/. No copy operation performed. Phase 14.1R is read-only verification.
Only remote is origin (antonyfmunoz/OS.git). No external repo writes. Phase 14.1R rules prohibit GitHub writes.
No Clerk SDK installed in /opt/OS (only cockpit has ClerkProvider). Auth migration requires Phase 14.2+ work packets with operator approval.
CreatorOS lives on Beast/GitHub, not /opt/OS. No CreatorOS source exists to modify. Migration recorded as needed in canonicality decisions artifact.
LyfeOS lives on Beast/GitHub, not /opt/OS. No LyfeOS source exists to modify. Migration recorded as needed in canonicality decisions artifact.
Readiness gate: ready_for_feature_build=false, no_feature_build_allowed=true. 5 blocking issues including critical auth/schema divergences.
Google Docs blocker artifact records inspection as blocked/pending. No API credentials available. Cannot canonize uninspected source.

All 11 key directories verified present (substrate/, adapters/, transports/, projections/, services/, nodes/, scripts/, tests/, data/, docs/, knowledge/). Phase 14.1R rules prohibit additional deletion.
